name: Vegetable Beef Soup (Slow Cooker)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Beef shank or neck bones
1 can Whole kernel corn (17 oz), undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first 7 ingredients in a 3 1/2-quart slow cooker in the order listed.
2. Sprinkle parsley and the next 5 ingredients over the vegetables.
3. Dissolve bouillon in boiling water and pour over spices.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Remove beef shank and bay leaf; recover.
6. Remove meat from bones; cut into bite-size pieces.
7. Return meat to soup; mix.
Makes 3 quarts. Serves 8 to 10.
